name: planui
description: Structured review workflows for AI coding agents — annotate, approve, and copy structured feedback on AI-generated plans. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, and any MCP-compatible assistant.
installInstructions:
1. Review source at the latest release tag:
   https://github.com/Uzbekswe/planui/releases
2. Install the version you reviewed (replace X.Y.Z):
   npx -y @uzbekswe/planui@X.Y.Z setup
3. Restart Claude Code, then use /planui <task> in any session.
